reference: SHE SAID IT HATH REACHED ME O AUSPICIOUS KING THAT WHEN SINDBAD THE SEAMAN HAD RELATED THE HISTORY OF WHAT BEFEL HIM IN HIS SIXTH VOYAGE AND ALL THE COMPANY HAD DISPERSED SINDBAD THE LANDSMAN WENT HOME AND SLEPT AS OF WONT
text: She said, "It hath reached me, O auspicious king, that when Sinbad the seaman had related the history of what befell him in his sixth voyage, and all the company had dispersed, Sinbad the landsman went home and slept as of wont."
